parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json; const kstDate = new Date().toLocaleString('ko-KR', { timeZone: 'Asia/Seoul' }); const emailHtml = `

NOTAM DB Upsert 완료

${kstDate} (KST)

수집 레코드 ${item.totalRaw}건
DB Upsert ${item.upsertedTotal}건
실행 시간 ${item.executionMs}ms
상태 ${item.status}
${item.errors.length > 0 ? '

Errors: ' + item.errors.join(', ') + '

' : ''}

Swagger: Supabase API

`; return [{ json: { emailSubject: `[NOTAM DB] ${item.crawledAt.split('T')[0]} - ${item.upsertedTotal}건 upsert (${item.status})`, emailHtml, sheetRow: { timestamp: kstDate, workflow: 'NOTAM DB Upsert', total_raw: item.totalRaw, upserted: item.upsertedTotal, execution_ms: item.executionMs, status: item.status, errors: item.errors.join('; ') || 'none' } } }];
